'''Terrina Square''' was a public plaza on the world of [[Quellor/Legends|Quellor]].

This square was the location of an anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] rally during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], in which the protesters burned an effigy of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. The [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] ordered to enforce crowd control [[Massacre at Terrina Square|opened fire]] on the rally members, killing them all - despite having specific orders not to fire upon the peaceful protesters by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Toggan]].
